kpis.name: Demo — totals
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS total_nsv, SUM(units) AS total_units, ROUND(SUM(volume), 1) AS total_volume, ROUND(AVG(nsv), 2) AS avg_nsv FROM sales

trend.name: Demo — monthly trend
trend.sql: SELECT month, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv, SUM(units) AS units, ROUND(SUM(volume), 1) AS volume FROM sales GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

region.name: Demo — NSV by region
region.sql: SELECT region, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales GROUP BY region ORDER BY nsv DESC

category.name: Demo — NSV by category
category.sql: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales GROUP BY category ORDER BY nsv DESC

channel.name: Demo — NSV by channel
channel.sql: SELECT channel, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales GROUP BY channel ORDER BY nsv DESC

brand.name: Demo — top brands
brand.sql: SELECT brand, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales GROUP BY brand ORDER BY nsv DESC LIMIT 10

supplier.name: Demo — by supplier
supplier.sql: SELECT supplier, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv, SUM(units) AS units, ROUND(SUM(volume), 1) AS volume FROM sales GROUP BY supplier ORDER BY nsv DESC

opco.name: Demo — NSV by OpCo
opco.sql: SELECT opco, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales GROUP BY opco ORDER BY nsv DESC

pgroup.name: Demo — by product group
pgroup.sql: SELECT product_group, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv, SUM(units) AS units FROM sales GROUP BY product_group ORDER BY nsv DESC

customers.name: Demo — top customers
customers.sql: SELECT customer, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales GROUP BY customer ORDER BY nsv DESC LIMIT 10

heatmap.name: Demo — region × month
heatmap.sql: SELECT region, month, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales GROUP BY region, month ORDER BY region, month

avb.name: Demo — actual vs budget (monthly)
avb.sql: SELECT a.month AS month, a.actual AS actual, b.budget AS budget FROM (SELECT month, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS actual FROM sales GROUP BY month) a JOIN (SELECT month, ROUND(SUM(budget_nsv), 2) AS budget FROM budget GROUP BY month) b ON a.month = b.month ORDER BY a.month

variance.name: Demo — budget variance by region
variance.sql: SELECT a.region AS region, a.actual AS actual, b.budget AS budget, ROUND(a.actual - b.budget, 2) AS variance, ROUND(100.0 * (a.actual - b.budget) / NULLIF(b.budget, 0), 1) AS variance_pct FROM (SELECT region, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS actual FROM sales GROUP BY region) a JOIN (SELECT region, ROUND(SUM(budget_nsv), 2) AS budget FROM budget GROUP BY region) b ON a.region = b.region ORDER BY variance DESC

cyly.name: Demo — CY vs LY by product group
cyly.sql: SELECT product_group, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2026 THEN nsv ELSE 0 END), 2) AS cy, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2025 THEN nsv ELSE 0 END), 2) AS ly, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2026 THEN nsv ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2025 THEN nsv ELSE 0 END), 2) AS delta FROM sales GROUP BY product_group ORDER BY cy DESC

drill.name: Demo — region drilldown ({{region}})
drill.sql: SELECT month, product_group, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales WHERE ({{region}} IS NULL OR region = {{region}}) GROUP BY month, product_group ORDER BY month, nsv DESC

prod_for_region.name: Demo — products in region ({{region}})
prod_for_region.sql: SELECT product_group, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv, SUM(units) AS units FROM sales WHERE ({{region}} IS NULL OR region = {{region}}) GROUP BY product_group ORDER BY nsv DESC

filt_month.name: Demo — monthly NSV (filtered)
filt_month.sql: SELECT month, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv FROM sales WHERE ({{region}} IS NULL OR region = {{region}}) AND ({{channel}} IS NULL OR channel = {{channel}}) AND ({{category}} IS NULL OR category = {{category}}) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

filt_table.name: Demo — region × channel × category (filtered)
filt_table.sql: SELECT region, channel, category, ROUND(SUM(nsv), 2) AS nsv, SUM(units) AS units FROM sales WHERE ({{region}} IS NULL OR region = {{region}}) AND ({{channel}} IS NULL OR channel = {{channel}}) AND ({{category}} IS NULL OR category = {{category}}) GROUP BY region, channel, category ORDER BY nsv DESC

region_opt.name: Demo — region options
region_opt.sql: SELECT DISTINCT region AS value, region AS label FROM sales ORDER BY 1

channel_opt.name: Demo — channel options
channel_opt.sql: SELECT DISTINCT channel AS value, channel AS label FROM sales ORDER BY 1

category_opt.name: Demo — category options
category_opt.sql: SELECT DISTINCT category AS value, category AS label FROM sales ORDER BY 1

opco_opt.name: Demo — OpCo options
opco_opt.sql: SELECT DISTINCT opco AS value, opco AS label FROM sales ORDER BY 1

supplier_opt.name: Demo — supplier options
supplier_opt.sql: SELECT DISTINCT supplier AS value, supplier AS label FROM sales ORDER BY 1
